author: ec2-user
text: Signed-link/RPL reconciliation review loop: reviewer 1 found no correctness defects; residual gap is no node-level per-field tamper test. Reviewer 2 confirmed signed-wire reconstruction and replay flow, and identified pre-auth SCHC decompression; filed deferred project-LICHEN-c76o because a safe fix requires a new two-phase verification API outside the frozen ledger. Reviewer 3 found no payload/MIC defect; its public CoAP-wrapper concern is expected fail-closed removal from the coordinated signed-link API change. Validation: lichen-node 202 tests, lichen-link 75 tests, Python 373 passed/12 skipped, C frame 15/15, C Schnorr 8/8, replay/link_ctx success, Zephyr link_crypto 13/13, no-default checks pass.
